glosses.ja: 知らせる; 通知する

translations.en: I’ll inform you as soon as possible.
translations.de: Ich sage dir so bald wie möglich Bescheid.
translations.ru: Я сообщу тебе как можно скорее.
translations.pt: Vou te informar assim que possível.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ thông báo cho bạn sớm nhất có thể.
translations.nl: Ik laat het je zo snel mogelijk weten.
translations.hi: मैं आपको जल्द से जल्द बताऊँगा।
translations.pl: Poinformuję cię tak szybko, jak to możliwe.
translations.el: Θα σε ενημερώσω το συντομότερο δυνατό.
translations.nb: Jeg gir deg beskjed så snart som mulig.
translations.id: Saya akan memberi tahu Anda secepatnya.
translations.sv: Jag informerar dig så snart som möjligt.
translations.ro: Te voi informa cât mai curând posibil.
translations.da: Jeg giver dig besked så hurtigt som muligt.
translations.fi: Ilmoitan sinulle niin pian kuin mahdollista.
translations.ja: できるだけ早くお知らせします。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the finite verb.
Clitic object pronoun (2nd person singular), elided before a vowel; direct object of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate of the clause.
Preposition forming a compound subordinator with ‘que’ (dès que = ‘as soon as’); marks a temporal threshold.
Subordinating conjunction completing ‘dès que’; introduces a temporal subordinate clause.
Adjective used in the fixed expression ‘dès que possible’ (‘as soon as possible’); predicate-like within the subordinate clause.

sentences.target: Vous informez les clients au comptoir.

translations.fr: Vous informez les clients au comptoir.
translations.en: You inform the customers at the counter.
translations.es: Ustedes informan a los clientes en el mostrador.
translations.de: Sie informieren die Kunden an der Theke.
translations.it: Voi informate i clienti al bancone.
translations.pt: Vocês informam os clientes no balcão.
translations.vi: Bạn thông báo cho khách hàng tại quầy.
translations.nl: Jullie informeren de klanten aan de toonbank.
translations.hu: Önök tájékoztatják a vásárlókat a pultnál.
translations.hi: आप काउंटर पर ग्राहकों को जानकारी देते हैं।
translations.id: Anda memberi tahu pelanggan di konter.
translations.ja: カウンターでお客様に案内しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person plural or formal singular; subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural; agrees with ‘Vous’.
Definite article, plural; determiner of ‘clients’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘informez’.
Preposition; contraction of ‘à le’; introduces a locative complement (‘au comptoir’).
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘au’; denotes location.

sentences.target: On doit informer la mairie aujourd’hui.

translations.fr: On doit informer la mairie aujourd’hui.
translations.en: We have to inform the town hall today.
translations.es: Tenemos que informar al ayuntamiento hoy.
translations.de: Wir müssen heute das Rathaus informieren.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天必须通知市政府。
translations.yue: 我哋今日要通知市政府。
translations.pt: Temos que informar a câmara municipal hoje.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לעדכן את העירייה היום.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải thông báo cho tòa thị chính hôm nay.
translations.nl: We moeten vandaag de gemeente informeren.
translations.uk: Ми маємо сьогодні повідомити міську раду.
translations.hu: Ma értesítenünk kell a polgármesteri hivatalt.
translations.hi: हमें आज नगर पालिका को सूचित करना है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να ενημερώσουμε τον δήμο σήμερα.
translations.nb: Vi må informere kommunen i dag.
translations.id: Kita harus memberi tahu balai kota hari ini.
translations.sv: Vi måste informera kommunen i dag.
translations.da: Vi skal informere kommunen i dag.
translations.ja: 今日、市役所に知らせなければなります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun meaning ‘one/we’; syntactic subject.
Modal auxiliary (present 3rd person singular); expresses obligation and selects the infinitive ‘informer’.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal ‘doit’.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘mairie’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘informer’.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time of the action.

sentences.target: Le directeur nous informe de l’annulation.

translations.fr: Le directeur nous informe de l’annulation.
translations.en: The director informs us about the cancellation.
translations.es: El director nos informa sobre la cancelación.
translations.de: Der Direktor informiert uns über die Absage.
translations.zh-Hans: 主管通知我们取消事宜。
translations.yue: 主管通知我哋取消一事。
translations.pt: O diretor nos informa sobre o cancelamento.
translations.vi: Giám đốc thông báo cho chúng tôi về việc hủy bỏ.
translations.nl: De directeur informeert ons over de annulering.
translations.hu: Az igazgató tájékoztat minket a lemondásról.
translations.hi: निदेशक हमें रद्दीकरण के बारे में सूचित करते हैं।
translations.el: Ο διευθυντής μας ενημερώνει για την ακύρωση.
translations.id: Direktur memberi tahu kami tentang pembatalan.
translations.ja: 部長が中止について私たちに知らせます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘directeur’.
Common noun; syntactic subject of the verb.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person plural; direct object of ‘informe’.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Preposition introducing the content (‘informer quelqu’un de …’).
Elided definite article (le/la) before a vowel; determiner of ‘annulation’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘de’.
